metadata.panel_name: F_ROH × H plane — hatchery health (demo / illustrative)
metadata.notes: F_ROH computed from long-tract ROH (>=1 Mb). H_per_site is mean per-site heterozygosity (folded SFS). H_ref is the species wild-population baseline (single number per species). Quadrant cuts are computed from the median F_ROH and median H/H_ref of loaded cohorts.
metadata.citation_caveat: Comparator H_ref and H_per_site values for non-catfish species in this demo file are illustrative only and should be replaced with values from the cited source before publication.

cohorts.notes: Thai hatchery, 9x WGS, ngsF-HMM tracts >=1 Mb. F_ROH from master_summary.tsv (cohort 2). H from ANGSD folded SFS, mean across 226 samples.
Wild-caught reference cohort. Used as the H_ref baseline for C. gariepinus.
African farmed cohort, less-eroded than this study.
Commercial salmonid line. Comparator for managed-aquaculture inbreeding pattern.
Reptile conservation comparator. Low F_ROH on a moderately-eroded background.
Severely-bottlenecked conservation case. Sits in the caution corner of the plane (high F_ROH on heavily-eroded background) — outcrossing within the stock cannot recover diversity.
